text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of all the sweets from my home country, I believe
stollen is the most well-known around here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's a spiced fruitcake sprinkled with powdered
sugar. During the holiday season, we cut off slices
of it to eat, just like bread.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Every year, my father would use the same recipe
to bake the perfect stollen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
He always made the same exact amount in the
same exact time. And every year, the joy I felt
was the same.
